name: Preset Vault
description: Capture, save, and re-apply Premiere Pro effect stacks across clips and projects

commands.name: Capture Effects
commands.description: Capture all effects from the selected clip as a reusable preset

commands.name: Apply Preset
commands.description: Apply a saved preset to the selected clip

commands.name: List Presets
commands.description: List all saved presets with optional filtering

commands.name: Delete Preset
commands.description: Delete a saved preset from the vault

commands.name: Export Macros
commands.description: Export presets as Excalibur, AHK, or Keyboard Maestro macros

commands.name: Clear Effects
commands.description: Remove all non-intrinsic effects from the selected clip
